title: real time clock
description: This mod displays the real-world time in Minecraft.
body:
Real Time Clock

Bring real-world time directly into your game!

This mod displays the current real system time right inside Minecraft. Whether you're building, exploring, or just playing – you'll always keep track of the time without having to leave the game.

✨ Features

Displays real system time in-game
Lightweight and performance-friendly
Easy to use
Seamlessly integrates into gameplay

📌 Why this mod?

Perfect for players who want to keep an eye on the time while playing, for streamers, or for anyone who enjoys a connection between the game and real life.
